MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Willi H. Siepmann, Esq., for failure of adjuster to appear at the July 29, 2002 Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference. Failure to comply with Local Rule 4.1 N (1) and 4.1 N (5) is ordered scheduled this day. There being good cause in response to the OSC court ordered OSC off calendar and dissolved. Order to Show Cause to Allan M. schuman, Esq., for faioure to appear at the Pre-Arbitration Settlemnent conference on 7/29/2002 is also ordered off calendar and dissolved.
